title: Contour HTTPProxy
description: Schema for the Contour HTTPProxy custom resource definition. HTTPProxy extends Kubernetes ingress with multi-team support, TLS delegation, weighted load balancing, and cross-namespace route inclusion.

apiVersion.description: API version of the HTTPProxy resource.

HTTPProxySpec.description: Specification of the HTTPProxy defining routing behavior and virtual host configuration.

includes.description: List of child HTTPProxy resources to include as sub-routes. Enables multi-team delegation of routing configuration.

routes.description: List of routing rules mapping request conditions to backend services.

ingressClassName.description: Name of the IngressClass resource to use for this HTTPProxy.

VirtualHost.description: Defines the virtual host for a root HTTPProxy, including its FQDN and TLS settings.

fqdn.description: Fully qualified domain name of the virtual host.

TLS.description: TLS configuration for a virtual host including certificate reference and protocol settings.

secretName.description: Name of the Kubernetes Secret containing the TLS certificate and key. May reference a Secret in another namespace using 'namespace/name' format if TLSCertificateDelegation grants access.

minimumProtocolVersion.description: Minimum TLS protocol version the virtual host will negotiate.

passthrough.description: If true, TLS termination is performed by the backend service rather than by Envoy.

enableFallbackCertificate.description: If true, Contour will serve a fallback certificate for SNI names that don't match any configured virtual host.

clientValidation.description: Configuration for mTLS client certificate validation.

caSecret.description: Name of the Secret containing the CA certificate for client validation.

skipClientCertValidation.description: If true, client certificates are requested but not required to be valid.

Include.description: A reference to another HTTPProxy to include as child routes, enabling cross-namespace routing delegation.

name.description: Name of the HTTPProxy resource to include.

namespace.description: Namespace of the included HTTPProxy. If omitted, defaults to the current namespace.

conditions.description: Conditions that requests must match for this inclusion to apply.

Route.description: A routing rule that maps matched HTTP requests to backend services.

conditions.description: Match conditions for this route. All conditions must match for the route to apply.

services.description: Backend services to route matching traffic to. Multiple services enable weighted load balancing.

enableWebsockets.description: If true, Contour will upgrade HTTP connections to WebSocket connections for this route.

permitInsecure.description: If true, allows the route to serve non-TLS requests when the parent virtual host has TLS configured.

pathRewritePolicy.description: Policy for rewriting the URL path before forwarding to backends.

MatchCondition.description: A condition that must be satisfied for a route or include to apply.

prefix.description: URL path prefix that incoming requests must start with.

exact.description: Exact URL path that incoming requests must match.

regex.description: Regular expression that the URL path must match.

HeaderMatchCondition.description: A condition matching on an HTTP request header value.

name.description: Name of the HTTP header to match.

present.description: If true, matches requests where the header is present.

notpresent.description: If true, matches requests where the header is absent.

contains.description: Matches if the header value contains this substring.

notcontains.description: Matches if the header value does not contain this substring.

exact.description: Matches if the header value equals this string exactly.

notexact.description: Matches if the header value does not equal this string.

regex.description: Matches if the header value matches this regular expression.

QueryParameterMatchCondition.description: A condition matching on an HTTP request query parameter.

name.description: Name of the query parameter to match.

exact.description: Matches if the query parameter equals this value.

prefix.description: Matches if the query parameter starts with this value.

suffix.description: Matches if the query parameter ends with this value.

contains.description: Matches if the query parameter contains this substring.

present.description: If true, matches requests where the query parameter is present.

regex.description: Matches if the query parameter value matches this regular expression.

Service.description: A backend Kubernetes Service to route traffic to.

name.description: Name of the Kubernetes Service in the same namespace.

port.description: Port number on the Kubernetes Service.

weight.description: Relative traffic weight. When multiple services are specified, traffic is distributed proportionally by weight.

protocol.description: Protocol to use when connecting to the upstream service.

healthPort.description: Port to use for health checking if different from the service port.

TCPProxy.description: TCP proxy configuration for TLS passthrough or raw TCP routing.

RetryPolicy.description: Configuration for retrying failed upstream requests.

count.description: Number of retry attempts before returning an error to the client.

perTryTimeout.description: Timeout per retry attempt as a duration string (e.g. '10s', '1m').

retriableStatusCodes.description: HTTP status codes from the backend that trigger a retry.

TimeoutPolicy.description: Timeout configuration for requests on this route.

response.description: Timeout for the entire response from the backend, as a duration string.

idle.description: Timeout for idle connections on this route.

idleConnection.description: Timeout for idle backend connections in the connection pool.

RateLimitPolicy.description: Rate limiting configuration applied to this route or virtual host.

local.description: Local rate limiting using Envoy's built-in token bucket algorithm, enforced per Envoy pod.

requests.description: Maximum number of requests allowed per time unit.

unit.description: Time unit for measuring request rate.

burst.description: Maximum burst above the rate limit that is momentarily allowed.

responseHeadersToAdd.description: Headers to add to rate-limited responses.

global.description: Global rate limiting via an external rate limit service shared across all Envoy pods.

descriptors.description: Rate limit descriptors sent to the global rate limit service.

CORSPolicy.description: Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) policy for the virtual host.

allowCredentials.description: Whether to include credentials in CORS responses.

allowOrigin.description: List of origins allowed to make cross-site requests. Use '*' to allow all origins.

allowMethods.description: HTTP methods allowed in cross-origin requests.

allowHeaders.description: Request headers that are allowed in cross-origin requests.

exposeHeaders.description: Response headers that the browser is allowed to access.

maxAge.description: Duration to cache CORS preflight responses, as a duration string.

AuthorizationServer.description: External authorization server configuration for validating requests to the virtual host.

extensionRef.description: Reference to an ExtensionService providing the external authorization server.

authPolicy.description: Policy settings for the authorization check.

disabled.description: If true, disables authorization for this virtual host or route.

context.description: Additional context key-value pairs to include in authorization requests.

failOpen.description: If true, requests proceed even if the authorization service is unavailable.

HeadersPolicy.description: Policy for adding, setting, or removing HTTP headers on requests or responses.

set.description: Headers to set, overriding any existing value.

remove.description: Header names to remove before forwarding.

value.description: HTTP header value. May reference request metadata using dynamic values.

HTTPProxyStatus.description: Observed status of an HTTPProxy as reported by the Contour controller.

currentStatus.description: High-level processing status of the HTTPProxy.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of the current status.

conditions.description: Detailed conditions describing the state of the HTTPProxy.

DetailedCondition.description: A detailed condition providing structured status information.

observedGeneration.description: Resource generation when this condition was last evaluated.

lastTransitionTime.description: Time when this condition last transitioned.

reason.description: Short, machine-readable reason for the condition.

SubCondition.description: A sub-condition providing granular detail about an error or warning.

name.description: Name of the resource, unique within its namespace.

labels.description: Labels for organizing and selecting the resource.
